title: potentilla multifida subvar. ornithopoda
intro: Potentilla multifida subvar. ornithopoda, also known as Five-Leaf Cinquefoil, is a plant species in the rose family with a unique characteristic of having five leaflets. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Potentilla multifida subvar. ornithopoda include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
